global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent logo, a cashback message, and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with NovaPay.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, centered shape that appears to be a combination of an oval and a square, outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller, centered shape that overlaps the background shape, also outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Cashback message
elements.description: Bold, black text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller line below it saying 'Built for peace of mind'.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple, bold logo at the top of the ad displaying the text 'NovaPay' in a prominent font.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A clear, black button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in white, inviting action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold text, cashback message, NovaPay logo, Shop now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main message is centered in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Built for peace of mind, NovaPay, Shop now
